course_description: This graduate-level course covers Lebesgue's integration theory with applications to analysis, including an introduction to convolution and the Fourier transform.
course_description_html: This graduate-level course covers Lebesgue’s integration theory with applications to analysis, including an introduction to convolution and the Fourier transform.

course_image_metadata.description: Photograph of Henri L?on Lebesgue (1875-1941), who laid the groundwork for modern measure theory and remade the theory of integration.  (Courtesy of The MacTutor History of Mathematics Archive, University of St. Andrews.)
